name: feat-ESE-21-5
title: Tilemap renderer — sprite tiles and density texture
description: Render tilemap tiles visually. Two paths: (1) uncarved tiles rendered as colored polygons via Three.js, (2) carved tiles rendered from density grid. Uses existing renderer infrastructure. Tile polygons converted to Three.js geometry (ShapeGeometry from polygon vertices). Debug overlays for grid lines, collision edges, and chunk boundaries.
acceptanceCriteria:
- renderTileMap creates Three.js meshes for each tile polygon
- Different tile shapes render correctly (full, triangle, half)
- Carved tiles show density-based rendering (solid where dense, empty where carved)
- Debug overlay functions: renderGrid, renderCollisionEdges, renderChunkBounds
- Colors per tile type for visual distinction
demoDeliverable: Screenshot showing rendered tilemap with multiple tile shapes and debug overlays.
testingScenarios:
- Render a 4x4 tilemap with mixed tile types, verify meshes created
- Render carved chunk, verify density overlay visible
- Toggle debug overlays
stakeholderUnderstanding: Rendering tiles and debug overlays visually.
